event: English hunting party departing for the hunt
description: A lively scene outside a grand English country house covered in ivy. Several figures on horseback and on foot prepare for a hunt. A woman in a white riding habit sits sidesaddle on a chestnut horse at center. A groom holds a dark horse beside her. Men in red hunting coats stand nearby, and a pack of hounds mills about in the foreground. The manor house with its warm stone facade and climbing vines forms the backdrop under autumn foliage.
